rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b); Educ. Code §37.211 governs public recognition of schools for safety measures. The provisions are unrelated.
quote: The center shall provide for the public recognition of schools that implement effective school safety measures and violence prevention.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
